name: Trust402
tagline: Trust before you pay. Proof after you buy.
positioning: Buyer-side trust and procurement agent for x402 resources.

laterResourcesToPreserve.reasonToWait: Live spending requires hot-wallet policy, allowlists, receipts, and approval thresholds.
